Tags: Computer Vision, Deep Learning, Knowledge Distillation, Self-Supervised Learning, Visualcamp

Intro

Self-supervised learning

IR and RGB loss (taken at same instance)

IR-IR with similar x,y points RGB-RGB with similar x,y points

IR-RGB with similar x,y points

loss function

  • cross entropy
  • mse
  • further modification
    • apply both gradients to teacher with alpha parameter

architecture

  • 1 model (shared weights) v. 2 models (teacher and student model)
  • more layers?
